---
name: 💡 Content Request / Feature
about: Suggest new content, resources, or improvements to this repository
title: '[CONTENT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 What would you like to see?

**Type of request:**
- [ ] New learning notes for a topic
- [ ] New resource link (course, video, book)
- [ ] New cheat sheet
- [ ] New tool guide
- [ ] New CTF category coverage
- [ ] New section in README
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📖 Describe what you want

**What should be added?**
> Be as specific as possible. What topic? What level? What format?

## 🎯 Why is this useful?

**Who would benefit from this?**
> e.g., "Beginners starting web security would find a cookie/session explainer very helpful before learning XSS"

## 🔗 Resources you already know

**Any links or references we should include?**
> Optional — share any free resources you've found helpful on this topic.

## 🙋 Would you like to contribute it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to write this myself (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No, I'd like someone else to create it
- [ ] I can help review it once created

---

*Thank you for helping improve C!p#3r Club IIST's CTF Roadmap!*
